testcase.name: sessionPrincipalDoesNotRetainPasswordHashAfterSuccessfulLogin
testcase.system-out:
19:46:57.777 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.hillcommerce.auth.AuthFlowIntegrationTest]: AuthFlowIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:46:57.891 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.hillcommerce.HillCommerceApplication for test class com.hillcommerce.auth.AuthFlowIntegrationTest 19:46:57.967 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.hillcommerce.auth.AuthFlowIntegrationTest]: AuthFlowIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:46:57.968 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.hillcommerce.HillCommerceApplication for test class com.hillcommerce.auth.AuthFlowIntegrationTest

The latest verified version of MySQL is 8.1. 2026-05-11T19:47:00.906+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] o.f.core.internal.command.DbValidate : Successfully validated 4 migrations (execution time 00:00.036s) 2026-05-11T19:47:00.923+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] o.f.core.internal.command.DbMigrate : Current version of schema `hill_commerce`: 4 2026-05-11T19:47:00.927+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] o.f.core.internal.command.DbMigrate : Schema `hill_commerce` is up to date. No migration necessary. 2026-05-11T19:47:01.343+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] eAuthenticationProviderManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with AuthenticationProvider bean with name appAuthenticationProvider 2026-05-11T19:47:01.344+08:00 WARN 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with an AuthenticationProvider bean. UserDetailsService beans will not be used by Spring Security for automatically configuring username/password login. Consider removing the AuthenticationProvider bean. Alternatively, consider using the UserDetailsService in a manually instantiated DaoAuthenticationProvider. If the current configuration is intentional, to turn off this warning, increase the logging level of testcase.name: loginFailsWithWrongPassword
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-11T19:47:04.868+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-05-11T19:47:04.868+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-05-11T19:47:04.869+08:00 INFO 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 1 ms 2026-05-11T19:47:04.883+08:00 DEBUG 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.m.user.mapper.UserMapper.selectList : ==> Preparing: SELECT id,email,password_hash,nickname,status,last_login_at,created_at,updated_at FROM users WHERE (email = ?) 2026-05-11T19:47:04.884+08:00 DEBUG 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.m.user.mapper.UserMapper.selectList : ==> Parameters: admin@hill-commerce.local(String) 2026-05-11T19:47:04.885+08:00 DEBUG 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.m.user.mapper.UserMapper.selectList : <== Total: 1 2026-05-11T19:47:04.885+08:00 DEBUG 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.m.u.m.U.findRoleCodesByUserId : ==> Preparing: select r.code from roles r join user_roles ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = ? order by r.id 2026-05-11T19:47:04.885+08:00 DEBUG 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.m.u.m.U.findRoleCodesByUserId : ==> Parameters: 1(Long) 2026-05-11T19:47:04.887+08:00 DEBUG 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.m.u.m.U.findRoleCodesByUserId : <== Total: 1 2026-05-11T19:47:04.940+08:00 WARN 156776 --- [hill-commerce-backend] [ main] c.h.modules.user.web.AuthController : Login failed: email=admin@hill-commerce.local, remoteAddr=127.0.0.1, reason=bad-credentials
